subject: Re: Ready TO GO
body:
May  G-D   be wit us both.  That was a beautiful  message and I thank you.  
Be safe, and Love,
 
Marcia  M.

subject: Re: Ready TO GO
body:
i'm in israel . i'll deliver the message


----- Original Message ----
From: "Maemarcia@aol.com" <Maemarcia@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Wednesday, April 23, 2008 2:53:52 PM
Subject: Re: Ready TO GO


and a HAPPY to YOU from US.
(yes, I brought the matzoh here- -  - can't afford to take any chances with the BIG GUY upstairs.
Made it through the "mainline" event - minimally sore.  Mere practice for tomorow.  7 hour surgery !
At BARNES JEWISH HOSPITAL f
 
Marcia M.

subject: Re: Ready TO GO
body:
Happy Passover

Sent from my iPhone

On Apr 23, 2008, at 3:14 PM, Maemarcia@aol.com wrote:

> Made it to St Louis.  Thought of bcking out but too late now.  It's  
> the right thing .  I am hurting too much.
> Nervous for 1st procedure  in 1 at 9:00 this time ....   didn't  
> think about being this scared already -  getting a Central Line  put  
> in .-- sounds so medical already.  They put you out  a  bit ut then  
> no eatting for the big day.  It  is uncomfortable too - I guess  
> nothing cmompared to  tomorrow.   ?
> Please keep up.  Love to you and Sarah
>
> Marcia M.
>
>
>
> Need a new ride? Check out the largest site for U.S. used car  
> listings at AOL Autos.
body_html:
Happy Passover 

Sent from my iPhone

On Apr 23, 2008, at 3:14 PM, Maemarcia@aol.com wrote:

Made it to St Louis.  Thought of bcking out but too late now.  It's the right thing .  I am hurting too much.
Nervous for 1st procedure  in 1 at 9:00 this time ....   didn't think about being this scared already -  getting a Central Line  put in .-- sounds so medical already.  They put you out  a  bit ut then no eatting for the big day.  It  is uncomfortable too - I guess nothing cmompared to  tomorrow.   ?
Please keep up.  Love to you and Sarah
 
Marcia M.
